source: Sohn Hearts & Minds Australia 2021 — Stock pick: Coinbase (COIN) — Coinbase Cloud as the AWS of crypto / web3 infra
summary: Programmable crypto enables far more diverse revenue streams than fiat-focused brokers, giving Coinbase structural monetization optionality
summary_extended: Baker argues that the programmable nature of cryptocurrency gives Coinbase a structural monetization advantage that is fundamentally unavailable to traditional fiat-focused brokers like Schwab or Fidelity. Unlike fiat brokers who are largely limited to trading commissions and interest income, Coinbase can generate revenue across trading fees, custody, staking rewards, infrastructure/cloud services, and developer tooling — multiple compounding layers that grow as web3 adoption expands. Baker frames this as a platform business model analogous to AWS, where Coinbase Cloud becomes the infrastructure layer for the broader crypto/web3 ecosystem, not merely an exchange. The investment implication is that Coinbase deserves a premium multiple relative to traditional financial brokers because its total addressable revenue opportunity scales with the entire web3 stack, not just crypto trading volumes. Baker presented this as a high-conviction long-term structural thesis at Sohn Hearts & Minds Australia 2021, with the programmable crypto layer being a core differentiator that compounds over time.
detail: Baker argues that the programmable nature of cryptocurrency allows Coinbase to generate revenue across trading, custody, staking, infrastructure/cloud, and developer tooling — layers simply unavailable to traditional fiat-focused brokers. This multi-layer monetization is a structural advantage that compounds over time as web3 adoption grows.
confidence_evidence: Explicitly stated as a core pillar of the thesis; framed as a structural differentiation vs. traditional brokers
quote_fragment: lets a company like Coinbase generate a wide variety of revenue streams

ticker_audit.reasoning: Coinbase is the explicit subject of the thesis — Baker's entire argument is about Coinbase's structural monetization advantage and its positioning as the AWS of crypto/web3 infrastructure.
